name: Wolong Real Estate Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Wolong Real Estate Group Co., Ltd. engages in the real estate development business in China. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Wolong Real Estate Co., Ltd and changed its name to Wolong Real Estate Group Co., Ltd. in January 2008. Wolong Real Estate Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Shaoxing, China.
